title: Better Gemstone Gauntlet
description: A resource pack for Hypixel Skyblock that repositions the gemstone gauntlet model to appear as if actually worn
body:
**Requires OptiFine for Minecraft v1.8.9**

**Note:** This pack doesn't change the texture, you get the golden texture by filling all gemstone slots with perfect gemstones!

# About

The gemstone gauntlet usually looks quite odd since it's a textured player head, so it's held in a way that doesn't look like you're actually wearing it.

This resource pack fixes that - it **repositions the gauntlet** to appear as if it's **over the player's hand**, both in first and third person:

![Repositioned gemstone gauntlet in 1st person](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uH4O7eeK/images/d801277d3abf8873c7ad894fc23d55ef410b2600.png)
![Repositioned gemstone gauntlet in 3rd person](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uH4O7eeK/images/af975016970b863f8763a2b3b4da23c7cb546040.png)

*This pack uses a weight of 100 for the repositioned gemstone gauntlet, meaning it should override (only the gauntlet) any other pack you have active, regardless of the pack order (unless one of those has a higher weight for it).*
